welcome.slogan_en: Create a pixel town, watch AI residents live their drama.
welcome.slogan_zh: Create a pixel town and watch AI residents unfold their stories.
welcome.footnote: Based on Stanford Generative Agents paper · Open Source

features.social_desc: Residents independently perceive, recall memories, and make decisions — fully autonomous
features.graph_desc: Force-directed graph evolves in real time — love, hate, rivalry all visible at a glance
features.god_desc: Inject events, edit personas, reshape the world — you control this town
features.report_desc: AI auto-generates a dramatic gossip report — one-tap screenshot to share

scene.title: Choose Scene
scene.subtitle: Pick a preset scene or describe your own town
scene.custom_placeholder: e.g. A seaside fishing village with 6 fishermen, a dock and a fish market…

compare.title: Compare Residents
compare.hint: Select two different residents to compare

timeline.title: World Timeline
timeline.empty: No world events recorded yet — keep simulating to see relationship milestones, weather changes, and more

create_resident.title: Create New Resident
create_resident.name: Name
create_resident.personality_placeholder: e.g. Warm and energetic, loves to help, but sometimes impulsive
create_resident.no_residents: No existing residents to relate to
create_resident.error: Failed to create resident. Make sure the backend is running.

message_bar.label: Feed
message_bar.empty: Waiting for events and dialogue to stream in…

guide.title: First-Time Tips
guide.tip1: Scroll to zoom · Drag to pan · Double-tap a resident to follow
guide.tip2: Use the toolbar below to inject events, edit personas, and view the live feed.

event_injector.title: Stir Up Drama
event_injector.desc: Pick a preset event or write your own narrative trigger to inject into the current tick.
event_injector.custom_placeholder: e.g. A rose shower suddenly falls on the plaza

persona.title: Rewrite a Fate
persona.name: Name
persona.hint: Store has {{count}} placeholder residents; editor only uses real residents from the backend.
persona.load_failed: Failed to load residents. Make sure the backend is running.

build.title: Build Mode Coming Soon
build.desc: Placeholder for the upcoming building drag, environment editing, and map workflow.

loading.title: Generating Town…
loading.desc: Waiting for WebSocket connection and first town snapshot. You'll be redirected automatically.
loading.timeout_title: Backend not running — please run docker compose up
loading.timeout_desc: Frontend is ready but no snapshot has arrived. Confirm the container is up, then retry.
loading.connecting: You'll be switched automatically once the first snapshot arrives.
fun_messages: The bakery is preheating its oven…
AI is learning how to gossip…

report.title: Daily Report
report.desc: A gossip-flavoured newspaper that compresses resident drama, relationship shifts, and weather vibes into a shareable card.

stats.title: Simulation Dashboard
stats.desc: Reads the backend stats endpoint and surfaces the key town-wide metrics in one compact panel.
stats.load_failed: Stats are temporarily unavailable. Make sure the backend is running.
stats.empty_desc: Waiting for the simulation to accumulate more signals.

settings.title: Settings
settings.llm_key_hint: Key is stored in memory only and cleared on page reload.

api_key_banner.message: No LLM API key configured — AI dialogue will be unavailable.

heatmap_panel.title: Relationship Heatmap
heatmap_panel.desc: Row → Column directed relationship intensity; diagonal is self (gray).

onboarding.line1: This is a town powered by AI...
onboarding.line2: Every resident has their own personality, memories, and goals
onboarding.ai_explains: Residents chat, form relationships, and spread gossip on their own
onboarding.your_turn: Now it's your turn to decide what happens next
onboarding.romance_desc: Drop an anonymous love letter and see who falls
onboarding.conflict_desc: Bring a mysterious stranger to shake things up
onboarding.watch_desc: Let the AI residents roam free

director.title: Director's Console
director.subtitle: Control the town's fate
director.arrange_encounter_desc: Teleport two residents to meet at a building
director.spread_rumor_desc: Make someone hear gossip about another

quest.title: Story Quests
quest.subtitle: Complete challenges, unlock story endings
quest.matchmaker_desc: Make two specified residents fall in love
quest.guardian_desc: Get all residents to shelter during a storm

app.conn_failed: Connection failed — please refresh the page
